claim: This document describes a fully local, zero-API autonomous AI node designed to run on a consumer-class NVIDIA GTX 1660 Super (6GB VRAM, Turing architecture, sm_75).
notes: Auto-extracted from source text. Review wording/scope.

claim: The node consists of five Python modules spanning approximately 2,500 lines of production code, plus a systemd service definition and credential template.
notes: Auto-extracted from source text. Review wording/scope.

claim: The architecture makes one fundamental trade: it exchanges spatial complexity (large parameter counts, large VRAM footprint) for temporal complexity (multi-pass reasoning, iterative refinement, sequential pipeline stages).
notes: Auto-extracted from source text. Review wording/scope.

claim: The num_ctx=4096 context window cap in PrefrontalCortex.infer() is a hard limit, not a preference.
notes: Auto-extracted from source text. Review wording/scope.

claim: The GTX 1660 Super is sm_75 (Turing).
notes: Auto-extracted from source text. Review wording/scope.

claim: Rule for scaffolding agents: never call FP8, BF16, or Flash Attention 2 on this card without probing compute capability first.
notes: Auto-extracted from source text. Review wording/scope.

claim: LLM inference and video generation each require approximately 5.5GB.
notes: Auto-extracted from source text. Review wording/scope.

claim: VRAMManager.acquire() sends POST /api/generate {keep_alive: 0} to the local ollama server, which evicts the LLM from VRAM
notes: Auto-extracted from source text. Review wording/scope.

claim: This is a cooperative protocol, not a hardware lock.

claim: The central innovation is replacing single-pass autoregressive generation with a structured 4-state pipeline.
notes: Auto-extracted from source text. Review wording/scope.

claim: Context isolation: each state receives a clean system+user message pair.
notes: Auto-extracted from source text. Review wording/scope.

claim: State 3 always receives token_multiplier=2.0.

claim: Live GPU temperature maps to a multiplier applied to every inference call.

claim: Floor values prevent any stage from dropping below functional minimums: route: 64, critique: 128, draft/synthesis: 192 tokens.

claim: Enabled via --tdp CLI flag.

claim: Word-level chunking: 400 words/chunk, 50-word overlap

claim: Retrieval: top-4 chunks by cosine similarity, returned as formatted context string
notes: Auto-extracted from source text. Review wording/scope.

claim: The router (STATE 0) generates a targeted rag_query string distinct from the raw user query, maximising retrieval precision.
